title: senna garrettiana
intro: Senna garrettiana, also known as the Kashmir senna, is a plant species belonging to the Fabaceae family, characterized by its small, yellow flowers and palmate leaves. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its laxative effects due to the presence of anthraquinone glycosides, which stimulate bowel movements and relieve constipation. Senna garrettiana has been used to treat various health issues, including constipation, diarrhea, and even fever, thanks to its ability to reduce inflammation and promote digestion. The plant's medicinal properties can be utilized through various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and dried extracts, which are often used to alleviate symptoms of digestive disorders.
